Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Text Ruling

Defendant City And County Of San Franciscos Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Authorize Release Of Mental Health Records Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Authorize Release Of Mental Health Records.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard on the discovery calendar (room 301) on the same date at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Authorize Release Of Mental Health Records
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
John Vannucci Esq. (415.981.7500; jvf@jfvlaw.com) for Plaintiff
Sabrina Berdux Esq.(415.554.4204; sabrina.m.berdux@sfcityatty.org) for Defendants.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO AUTHORIZE RELEASE OF MENTAL HEALTH RECORDS IS DENIED.

Mr. Vannucci to send his proposed order in Word format to Ms. Berdux. Ms. Berdux to insert the language she wants added to the proposed order and send it back to Mr. Vannucci and the Judge Pro Tem for review. Mr. Vannucci may respond by close of business, then the Judge Pro Tem will decide on which order to sign.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, not reported.(302/JPT)
